title: ageratina yecorana
intro: Ageratina yecorana, also known as Mexican Mountain Mint, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve muscle spasms. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Ageratina yecorana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
